faqs.question: How do I verify LiTong's authorized distributor status for Aurasemi products?
faqs.answer: You can verify LiTong's authorized distributor status through multiple channels: (1) Aurasemi official website - check the distributor list on Aurasemi's official website; (2) Authorization certificate - LiTong can provide official authorization documents from Aurasemi; (3) Direct verification - contact Aurasemi directly to confirm LiTong's distributor status; (4) Product authenticity - all LiTong-supplied Aurasemi products have genuine traceability. As an authorized distributor, LiTong provides full warranty support, technical assistance, and access to Aurasemi's engineering resources.
faqs.decisionGuide: Purchase from LiTong with confidence knowing you are getting genuine Aurasemi products with full support.

faqs.question: What is the process for requesting a quote?
faqs.answer: Requesting a quote from LiTong is straightforward: (1) Contact information - email sales@litong.com or call our sales hotline; (2) Product details - provide Aurasemi part numbers, quantities, and any special requirements; (3) Application information - share your application type for appropriate product recommendations; (4) Timeline - indicate your project timeline and any forecasted volumes; (5) Response time - quotes typically provided within 24-48 hours for standard products; (6) Volume pricing - tiered pricing available for volume orders. For complex projects, our FAE team can provide technical consultation alongside the quote.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong sales with your requirements for competitive pricing and technical support.

faqs.question: How can I get technical support for Aurasemi products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for Aurasemi products through multiple channels: (1) Phone support - call our technical support hotline during business hours; (2) Email support - send technical questions to fae@litong.com; (3) Online resources - access datasheets, application notes, and FAQs on our website; (4) On-site support - available for major customers and complex projects; (5) Design review - our FAE team can review your schematic and PCB layout; (6) Failure analysis - support for any quality issues or returns. Response times vary by priority: critical issues within 4 hours, standard questions within 24 hours.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong FAE team for prompt technical support on Aurasemi products.

faqs.question: What is the RMA process for defective products?
faqs.answer: LiTong's RMA process for Aurasemi products: (1) Contact - reach out to support@litong.com with product details and failure description; (2) Troubleshooting - our FAE team will help diagnose the issue remotely; (3) RMA number - if confirmed defective, an RMA number will be issued; (4) Return - ship the defective product to LiTong with RMA number clearly marked; (5) Analysis - Aurasemi engineering team analyzes the failure; (6) Replacement - replacement shipped within 3-5 business days after receipt. Standard warranty period is 2 years. Note: Physical damage and misuse are not covered under warranty.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong support for RMA assistance. We aim to minimize downtime with fast turnaround.

articles.title: Aurasemi Clock Chip Selection Guide
articles.summary: Comprehensive guide to selecting the right Aurasemi clock generator, jitter attenuator, or clock buffer for your application.
articles.content:
Selecting the right clock chip is crucial for system performance. This guide walks through the Aurasemi clock portfolio and provides selection criteria based on application requirements.

## Clock Chip Types

### Clock Generators
Best for: Creating multiple clock frequencies from a single reference
- Output frequencies: 1MHz to 2.1GHz
- RMS jitter: <100fs to <500fs
- Outputs: 2 to 10 differential pairs

### Jitter Attenuators
Best for: Cleaning noisy clock signals
- Input jitter tolerance: Up to 10ps
- Output jitter: <100fs typical
- Loop bandwidth: Configurable

### Clock Buffers
Best for: Distributing clocks to multiple loads
- Additive jitter: <50fs
- Fanout: 1:2 to 1:12
- Output types: LVDS/LVPECL/HCSL

## Key Selection Parameters

1. Output frequency range
2. Jitter requirements (RMS and phase noise)
3. Number of outputs needed
4. Output type (LVDS/LVPECL/HCSL/CMOS)
5. Supply voltage
6. Temperature range
7. Special features (SSC, hitless switching)

Contact LiTong's application engineering team for personalized selection assistance.

author.name: Michael Chen
author.title: Senior FAE - Timing Solutions
author.experience: 12 years in clock and timing applications

faeInsights.summary: Clock selection requires balancing jitter performance, output configuration, and cost.
faeInsights.problemAnalysis: Many customers select clock chips based only on frequency, ignoring jitter requirements.
faeInsights.solutionApproach: Follow a systematic selection process considering all relevant parameters.
faeInsights.insight: The best clock chip is one that meets all application requirements with adequate margins.
faeInsights.logic: Proper clock selection ensures system performance and avoids costly redesigns.
keyTakeaways: Match output type to load requirements
recommendations: Use selection checklists for consistent evaluation
bestPractices: Measure actual jitter in final design
troubleshootingTips: Check power supply noise with oscilloscope
Verify clock output with spectrum analyzer

customerCases.problem: Clock jitter causing high BER in SerDes links
customerCases.diagnosis: Inadequate clock source with high phase noise
customerCases.solution: Redesigned with AU5425 ultra-low jitter clock generator
customerCases.results: BER improved by 100x, meeting IEEE 802.3bj spec

articles.title: Aurasemi Power Management IC Selection Guide
articles.summary: How to select the right Aurasemi power management IC for your application based on voltage, current, and efficiency requirements.
articles.content:
Power management IC selection is critical for system reliability and efficiency. This guide explains the methodology for selecting Aurasemi power management solutions.

## Power Management IC Types

### VRM Controllers
Best for: Processor and FPGA core power
- Output current: 10A to 100A+
- Voltage range: 0.5V to 3.3V
- Features: PMBus, current sensing

### DC-DC Converters
Best for: General-purpose power conversion
- Input voltage: 2.5V to 60V
- Output current: 1A to 20A
- Topologies: Buck, boost, buck-boost

### Linear Regulators (LDO)
Best for: Low-noise analog power
- Input voltage: 1.8V to 20V
- Output current: 50mA to 2A
- Noise: <10μVrms

## Selection Criteria

1. Input voltage range
2. Output voltage and current
3. Efficiency requirements
4. Transient response
5. Protection features
6. Package size
7. Cost constraints

Contact LiTong FAE for detailed power design assistance.

faeInsights.summary: Power management selection requires careful analysis of electrical and thermal requirements.
faeInsights.problemAnalysis: Many designs fail due to inadequate power delivery or thermal management.
faeInsights.solutionApproach: Follow systematic selection and validation process.
faeInsights.insight: Power supply design is critical for system reliability.
faeInsights.logic: Proper power design ensures stable operation and long-term reliability.
recommendations: Use power calculators for initial selection

customerCases.problem: VRM efficiency below target at light load
customerCases.diagnosis: Controller not optimized for light-load efficiency
customerCases.solution: Redesigned with Aurasemi AU8020 with advanced control
